idea-plugin.name: FileRush - Create Files Fast
idea-plugin.description:
A keyboard-first blazingly fast file creation and navigation tool.
Press Ctrl+Alt+Shift+N to open the quick file dialog. Type any part of a path to fuzzy-find matching directories.
Navigate suggestions with Ctrl+N / Ctrl+P (or ↓ / ↑), and press Tab to autocomplete the path.
Then type your filename at the end and hit Enter to create and open the file instantly — no mouse needed.

If you have IDEAVim, you can remap the `FileRush.Open` action:
nnoremap fc :action FileRush.Open

action.description: Open fuzzy path picker to create a new file
